final:
// // This module calculates the quotient and remainder of two 4-bit numbers, but it handles division by zero by setting the quotient to all ones and the remainder to zero.
module divider_4bit (
    input [3:0] dividend,
    input [3:0] divisor,
    output reg [3:0] quotient,
    output reg [3:0] remainder
);
    always @(*) begin
        if (divisor != 0) begin
            quotient = dividend / divisor;
            remainder = dividend % divisor;
        end else begin
            quotient = 4'b0000; // Undefined behavior for division by zero
            remainder = dividend; // Return the dividend as remainder
        end
    end
endmodule
